integration_validation_v2.gap: Both assigned test files prove the MT only in-memory/on-disk and never touch the managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger that the contract's proof_target ('runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger') demands.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/flight_recorder_span_tests.rs:19-33,79-95 all assert against StubFrRecorder.events (in-memory Vec, src/.../spans.rs:184-206); tests/fr_event_registry_tests.rs:39-44,60-100 validate the on-disk FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json vs the Rust enum (std::fs::read_to_string), no PG. The impl is genuinely real (42-family registry, RAII span guard with 16-attr bounding) and a real EventLedger path exists (spans.rs:657,731 AggregateQueryBackend::Postgres on kernel_event_ledger; span_repo.rs SpanRepo) but is proven only by other non-assigned test files. No deferred-live escape present (sr1 PASS).

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
